title: Time Periods - Adding time restrictions to menus
workflow_title: Time Periods - Adding time restrictions to menus
source: support.dish.co official article + live form inspection

steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, open Products and select Periods.
Enter a name for the period that matches when {NAME} should be shown — you'll apply it to the menu that shows {NAME}.
Use the All day option to set whether the period covers the whole day.
Set the start date and time.
Set the duration of the period.
Enable Repeatable if the period should recur.
Finally, send the changes via General, the sub-category General, and Send.
